title: Corothamnus agnipilus
taxonomy: Corothamnus agnipilus is a flowering plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Corothamnus. The species is native to Western Australia and is known for its unique characteristics. Corothamnus agnipilus is classified as a shrub with small white flowers. Its classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Angiospermophyta.
